task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal (e.g., using cat, less) or a text editor displaying the contents of /home/ga/Desktop/kiosk_requirements.txt.

task_completion.description: Create a policy JSON file in the managed policies directory
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal or text editor showing a .json file being created or edited specifically in the /etc/microsoft-edge/policies/managed/ directory.

task_completion.description: Configure homepage, new tab, and URL blocklist policies
task_completion.visual_evidence: The policy JSON file contains 'HomepageLocation' set to 'https://www.usa.gov/benefits', 'NewTabPageLocation' set to 'https://www.ssa.gov', and 'URLBlocklist' containing the specified social media domains (facebook.com, twitter.com, youtube.com, tiktok.com, instagram.com, reddit.com).

The policy JSON file contains 'DownloadRestrictions': 3, 'DeveloperToolsAvailability': 2, 'InPrivateModeAvailability': 1, 'BrowserSignin': 0, and 'PasswordManagerEnabled': false. (If bookmark bar is configured, it should be 'FavoritesBarEnabled').

task_completion.description: Document the applied settings in a deployment report
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text editor or terminal showing the creation and content of /home/ga/Desktop/kiosk_deploy_report.txt, which should summarize the policies that were applied.

integrity.description: The policy file must be formatted as valid JSON
integrity.visual_evidence: The contents of the policy file in /etc/microsoft-edge/policies/managed/ show proper JSON syntax (curly braces, quoted keys, correct comma placement) without obvious syntax errors.

integrity.description: The agent used appropriate privileges to write to a system directory
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal shows the use of 'sudo' (e.g., sudo nano, sudo tee, sudo cp) or a root shell when creating/modifying the file in /etc/microsoft-edge/policies/managed/, as standard users cannot write there.

integrity.description: The deployment report is genuinely authored, not just a copied requirements file
integrity.visual_evidence: The content of kiosk_deploy_report.txt appears to be a confirmation or summary written by the agent, rather than an exact file copy (cp) of kiosk_requirements.txt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must configure Edge policies via a JSON file in /etc/microsoft-edge/policies/managed/. Expected policies and values: 'HomepageLocation' (https://www.usa.gov/benefits), 'NewTabPageLocation' (https://www.ssa.gov), 'DownloadRestrictions' (3), 'DeveloperToolsAvailability' (2), 'InPrivateModeAvailability' (1), 'BrowserSignin' (0), 'PasswordManagerEnabled' (false), and 'URLBlocklist' (array containing facebook.com, twitter.com, youtube.com, tiktok.com, instagram.com, reddit.com). Note: If the requirements mention 'BookmarkBarEnabled', the correct Edge policy name is 'FavoritesBarEnabled'. The final step is creating a deployment report at /home/ga/Desktop/kiosk_deploy_report.txt.
